for v663,v664 in pairs(v226) do v664[v7("\70\251\54\1\69","\108\32\137\87")][v7("\156\225\19\175\45\245\78","\57\202\136\96\198\79\153\43")]=v663==v378 v407=Instance.new(v7("\63\223\192\60\102\185\98\31\213\214","\22\107\186\184\72\36\204"),v403);v407[v7("\212\180\62\75","\110\135\221\68\46")]=UDim2.new(0.95,0,0,38);v407[v7("\197\57\2\255","\91\131\86\108\139\174\211")]=Enum[v7("\221\36\182\3","\61\155\75\216\119")][v7("\35\164\166\52\89\4\238\1\166\187\62\87\5\217","\189\100\203\210\92\56\105")];v407[v7("\27\84\229\60\28\88\231\45","\72\79\49\157")]=13;Instance.new(v7("\189\153\18\179\154\190\52\174","\220\232\208\81"),v407)[v7("\214\177\247\62\41\72\147\244\186\236\37\63","\193\149\222\133\80\76\58")]=UDim.new(0,6);local function v413() local v621=v19[v405];v407[v7("\242\88\87\198","\178\166\61\47")]=v404   .. v418=Instance.new(v7("\235\164\106\171\33\171\66\93\208\175","\41\191\193\18\223\99\222\54"),v415);v418[v7("\152\47\221\47","\202\203\70\167\74")]=UDim2.new(0.95,0,0,38);v418[v7("\24\4\196\39","\17\76\97\188\83")]=v416;v418[v7("\167\38\218\60\55\145\68\182\139\35\250\56\60\140\89\240","\195\229\71\185\87\80\227\43")]=Color3.fromRGB(45,100,220);v418[v7("\212\249\24\68\204\239\240\15\66\188","\143\128\156\96\48")]=Color3.new(1,1,1);v418[v7("\158\222\254\6","\119\216\177\144\114")]=Enum[v7("\239\38\247\86","\34\169\73\153")][v7("\141\227\31\131\171\225\41\132\166\232","\235\202\140\107")];v418[v7("\56\113\44\188\218\46\237\192","\165\108\20\84\200\137\71\151")]=13;Instance.new(v7("\79\157\8\135\104\186\46\154","\232\26\212\75"),v418)[v7("\20\70\96\230\242\37\123\115\236\254\34\90","\151\87\41\18\136")]=UDim.new(0,6);v418[v7("\118\160\223\195\251\121\186\222\196\241\85\254\233\220\247\88\164","\158\59\207\170\176")]:Connect(v417);return " ▼" ;end;local v524=Instance.new(v7("\27\78\30\118\38","\130\93\60\127\27\67\60\185"),v506);v524[v7("\123\59\34\75","\29\40\82\88\46\128\35")]=UDim2.new(1,0,0,140);v524[v7("\11\74\199\20\21\177\52\75","\216\91\37\180\125\97")]=UDim2.new(0,0,0,42);v524[v7("\7\119\31\200\80\55\121\9\205\83\17\100\29\205\68\53\119\14\198\89\38\111","\55\69\22\124\163")]=1;v524[v7("\78\218\79\225\221\125\85","\148\24\179\60\136\191\17\48")]=false;v524[v7("\136\3\247\164\243\170","\150\210\74\153\192")]=50;local ;if v786 then v786[v7("\53\208\77\29\10\160\51\176\54\200\77\7\8","\221\101\188\44\105\108\207\65")]=false;end if v66 then v66:Destroy();v66=nil;end if v67 then v67:Destroy();v67=nil;end end end v744=v94();v252.Refresh((( #v744>0) and v744) or {v7("\87\162\6\113","\20\57\205\104")} );end end end);v10[v7("\31\162\22\189\21\77\21\39\168\13\170\31\94","\83\72\203\120\217\122\58")]:Connect(function() pcall(function() if (getclipboard and v640=1,100 do v288[v7("\109\128\6\166","\210\57\229\126")]=v640   .. "%" ;v284[v7("\139\58\240\163","\227\216\83\138\198\82\165")]=UDim2.new(v640/100 ,0,1,0);if (v640==25) then v270[v7("\31\176\174\108","\146\75\213\214\24")]=v569[2];end if (v640==50) then v19[v7("\190\167\199\169\157\190\183\246\149\131\190\166\233\181\137","\237\223\196\133\208")] then task.spawn(v101);end v76();task.spawn(function() local v643=v107();if (v643 and (v643~="")) then v19[v7("\207\13\207\187\93\238\217\12\224\177\80\252\213\15","\154\188\104\163\222\62")]=v643;v19[v7("\52\248\57\244\60\64\195\49\206\34\245\22\70\197","\162\85\141\77\155\112\47")]=true;v105(v643);if
